name: Cala Mitjana
description: A wide cove of pale sand and clear water, framed by cliffs that some use to leap into the sea. Near Cala Galdana, it pairs beauty with reasonable access.

practicalInfo.acceso: Easy walk (~15 min) from the car park through pine woods
practicalInfo.aparcamiento: Free car park that fills early in high season
practicalInfo.servicios: No facilities: bring everything you need
practicalInfo.mejorEpoca: June and September; in August, early

planner.shuttleInfo: Large free dirt car park (~250 spaces) + 1.2 km signposted downhill path. Arrive before 10am in peak season. Bus L52 (Ciutadella) / L51 (Maó); also on foot from Cala Galdana along the Camí de Cavalls.
planner.effortNote: 1.2 km downhill path, mostly easy and family-friendly; not for wheelchairs.
highlights: walk the 1.2 km path from the car park down to the pale-sand cove
watch some leap into the water from the cliffs (with care)
arrive before 10 am in summer: the car park fills up early
